_instructions.1: Replace REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_PATH with the full path to this project
_instructions.2: For Claude Desktop: Add this to your claude_desktop_config.json
_instructions.3: For Copilot Studio: Use this configuration in your MCP server settings
_instructions.4: Example path (Windows): C:/Users/YourName/Documents/VSCode/Microsoft Release Planner MCP Server/build/index.js
_instructions.5: Example path (Mac/Linux): /Users/YourName/Documents/VSCode/Microsoft Release Planner MCP Server/build/index.js
